personal.title: Product - Project Manager & ΙΤ Business Analyst
personal.abstract: Enthusiastic and results-driven IT Product & Project Manager, bridging technology and business to deliver measurable impact. I lead complex software initiatives end-to-end—from product vision to delivery—aligning strategy, governance, and stakeholder needs with Agile, Hybrid, and Waterfall methodologies. Experienced in driving digital transformation across SaaS products in highly regulated environments, turning technical challenges into actionable business solutions while optimizing processes, mitigating risks, and fostering innovation across SMEs and enterprise organizations.

experience.title: Product Manager
responsibilities: Lead end-to-end product management for 3 SaaS products in highly regulated environments, driving feature development and roadmap prioritization
Coordinate agile workflows using Azure DevOps and Wrike, managing sprint planning and release cycles across multiple development teams
Establish comprehensive QA processes with automated testing frameworks (Robot Framework) and API validation (Postman Flows)
Collaborate with engineering to define technical requirements and validate API specifications using Swagger and Apidog
Manage version control and developer collaboration through GitHub with strict documentation and compliance protocols

experience.title: Project Manager
responsibilities: Managed portfolio of 18–22 concurrent projects, leading end-to-end delivery with large enterprise clients
Operated in complex, regulated environments ensuring alignment across business, compliance, and technical requirements
Applied Waterfall, Hybrid, and Agile methodologies for effective project delivery and change management
Identified business needs, analyzed stakeholder expectations, and monitored regulatory updates to inform project objectives

experience.title: Project Consultant
responsibilities: Led initiatives to modernize client business processes through digital invoicing, ERP, EDI, WMS, CRM, and eCommerce solutions
Analyzed business requirements and designed solutions aligned with customer workflows, implementing PEPPOL and MyData standards
Collaborated with development teams to translate business needs into technical tasks and ensure seamless API integration

experience.title: Greek Military Service
responsibilities: Provided technical support, troubleshooting hardware and network issues
Assisted in administration of resources and managed communication systems

experience.title: IT & Digital Transformation Coordinator
responsibilities: Drove digital transformation by identifying technical challenges and implementing solutions to enhance business performance
Collaborated with stakeholders to implement ERP, CRM, and eCommerce platforms, optimizing system performance
Managed IT infrastructure including hardware, software, networks, servers, and operating systems

education.degree: Associate Degree (Diploma) in Computer Applications Technician
education.institution: National Organization for Certification of Qualifications (EOPPEP)
education.description: Officially recognized under the HQF and aligned with the EQF at Education Level 5 (Associate Degree), under registration code:250409373 GR.

education.degree: Professional Certification in Computer Applications Technician
education.description: Focus on multimedia, web development, and business software applications. Experience in C#, C++, HTML, CSS, Java, SQL, and cloud technologies.

education.degree: Technical High School Diploma in Computer and Network Technology
education.description: Specialization in computer hardware, network technician, network installation, maintenance, and systems troubleshooting.

projects.name: SaaS Product Suite Management
projects.description: Led end-to-end product management for 3 regulated SaaS products, implementing automated QA frameworks and API validation workflows.

projects.name: Enterprise Project Portfolio (18-22 Projects)
projects.description: Managed concurrent enterprise projects using Waterfall, Hybrid, and Agile methodologies in complex, regulated environments.

projects.name: Digital E-Invoicing Integration
projects.description: Coordinated electronic invoicing compliance rollout implementing PEPPOL and MyData standards for enterprise clients.
